Our Lip Gloss Collection

Each lip gloss is handcrafted in small batches with love, safe ingredients, and lots of sparkle!

✨ All Lip Glosses Include ✨

🌱 Kid-safe ingredients
💝 Handwritten thank you note
📦 Cute eco-friendly packaging
✨ Long-lasting shine
💖

Berry Blast

$8.00

A sweet berry flavor that tastes as good as it looks! Perfect for everyday wear with a beautiful red-pink tint.

  • 🍓 Fresh berry scent
  • 💋 Natural red-pink tint
  • ⏰ 4-hour lasting wear
Add to Cart
🌸

$8.00

Light pink with a hint of vanilla - just like being at the carnival! Our most popular flavor.

  • 🍦 Sweet vanilla scent
  • 🌸 Soft pink tint
  • ⭐ Customer favorite!
Add to Cart
✨

$10.00

Clear gloss with biodegradable glitter that makes your lips shine like stars! Perfect for special occasions.

  • ✨ Biodegradable glitter
  • 🌟 Ultra-shine finish
  • 🎉 Perfect for parties

🍓

  • 🌅 Coral sunset tint
  • ☀️ Summer special

$8.00

Cool mint flavor with a hint of coconut and subtle blue tint. Like a day at the beach!

  • 🌊 Cool mint coconut
  • 💙 Light blue tint
  • ❄️ Refreshing finish

🍑

Mix and match any 3 lip glosses and get FREE shipping plus a special surprise gift!

Ingredient Information

Safety first! Here's what goes into every lip gloss:

✅ What's Inside:

  • Coconut oil (moisturizing base)
  • Beeswax (natural thickness)
  • Food-grade flavor oils
  • Mica powder (safe colorants)
  • Vitamin E oil (nourishing)
  • Biodegradable glitter (sparkle varieties)

🚫 What's NOT Inside:

  • No harsh chemicals
  • No artificial preservatives
  • No animal testing (ever!)
  • No ingredients I can't pronounce
  • No toxic materials
  • No mystery stuff

All ingredients are kid-safe and approved by my parents!

ZZ's Lip Gloss Co.

Handcrafted with ❤️ by a young entrepreneur
